name: motherduck-skills
description: MotherDuck skills for agents and developers: connect, explore schemas, write DuckDB SQL, use the REST API, build Dives, and ship dashboards, pipelines, and customer-facing analytics.

interface.shortDescription: Connect, explore, query, and build on MotherDuck.
interface.longDescription: A packaged MotherDuck skill catalog for connecting to MotherDuck, inspecting live schemas, writing DuckDB SQL, using the REST API for administration, building Dives, and shipping dashboards, pipelines, and customer-facing analytics.
defaultPrompt: Use MotherDuck Skills to explore my databases and recommend the right query path.
Use MotherDuck Skills to design a Dive-backed dashboard for my analytics tables.
